subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath sent down from the heavens abundant rain, whereupon every dormant land did quiver and swell, bringing forth from all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن انزل من السماء ماء ثجاجا فاهتزت و ربت کل ارض هامده و انبتت من کل
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wisdom [hikmat]
